panels.title: Recent failures
panels.description: Most recent 100 error events. The user, tool, error_code, and message are everything you need to chase a failure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT occurred_at AS "time", host_user AS "user", event_type AS "tool", error_code, error_message, scope_shot, scope_asset FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Errors by tool
panels.description: Count of error events per tool (event_type) in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_type AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Errors by user
panels.description: Count of error events per user in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(host_user, '<unknown>') AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY host_user ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Errors by error_code
panels.description: Count of error events per error_code (the stable token from PipelineError subclasses) in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(error_code, 'UNKNOWN') AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Events per user (all statuses)
panels.description: Total events emitted per user. Sort descending to see who is exercising the pipeline most — these are the people to ask for feedback.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(host_user, '<unknown>') AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY host_user ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Tools used per user
panels.description: For each (user, tool) pair: how many runs and how many errors. Spot tools that one user hits but nobody else exercises.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(host_user, '<unknown>') AS "user", event_type AS "tool", count(*) AS "runs", count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'error') AS "errors" FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(occurred_at) GROUP BY host_user, event_type ORDER BY "runs" DESC
